channel.title: lvm on My Blog - For Fun
channel.description: Recent content in lvm on My Blog - For Fun

item.title: How to Extend All Available Disk to Local Data
item.description: How to extend all available disk to local-data After install Proxmove VE, the local-data only have about 50GB disk availabe. But how to let all availabld disk space to the local-data? Here we go: # Remove local-data lvremove /dev/pve/data # Extend all available disk to /dev/pve/root lvresize -l +100%FREE /dev/pve/root #recreate pve-root resize2fs /dev/mapper/pve-root Reference Proxmox – Remove LVM local-data

item.title: How to Extend Lvm Allocted PE With Freee PE
item.description: LVM EXTEND How to extend lvm size use free PE # show volume group information vgdisplay --- Volume group --- VG Name ubuntu-vg System ID Format lvm2 Metadata Areas 1 Metadata Sequence No 2 VG Access read/write VG Status resizable MAX LV 0 Cur LV 1 Open LV 1 Max PV 0 Cur PV 1 Act PV 1 VG Size <99.00 GiB PE Size 4.00 MiB Total PE 25343 Alloc PE / Size 1024 / 4.
